headline: Amazon, Microsoft, Google and Shopify Are Racing To Integrate AI, Now Engineers Say They're Working Faster With Less Thinking Time — And More Pressure Than Ever

headline: Trump's Targeting Of Apple Isn't Random — Analyst Says It's A Calculated Move For Maximum Political Gain
summary: Top analyst Ming-Chi Kuo says Donald Trump keeps targeting Apple not for national security reasons, but because it offers maximum publicity, low resistance, and political leverage—regardless of how the company responds.
